conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt most connected to J because our conversations flowed naturally, with mutual excitement about the game and plans to collaborate, making me feel like we were truly on the same team. E was another strong connection, as we shared similar motivations and openly discussed building alliances early, which built a solid foundation of trust. B also stood out, with our chat about personal hobbies and books creating a warm, genuine bond that went beyond just the game. On the other hand, I felt least connected to A, as our discussion was mostly about everyday life and work without diving into game strategies, leaving it feeling more superficial.

Yes, I made several agreements, such as teaming up with E and forming early alliances with C and D to share tips and coordinate moves. Going into the game, I trust J, E, and B the most due to our strong connections and aligned strategies, but I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, as all interactions were positive and cooperative.
